title: [codereview-P3] Added TX stress but metrics assertion too weak
description: After adding start_transmission and advance_to in test_500_node_conference, the metrics assert is generic. Should check for collision_count or tx_count >0 in metrics to verify stress occurred. Also add check for PER in dense scenario. test_scale.py:380
close_reason: Metrics validation strengthened with explicit tx_count, collisions, collision_rate asserts. All codereview addressed.
